title: Learning Path
description: Breaking a goal into phases is usually more sustainable than collecting material without a route.
noticeDescription: This path is generated for {{level}} level over {{weeks}} weeks.

descriptions.0: Build terms, core ideas, and a minimum workable mental model.
descriptions.1: Practice around the sharpest weak spots and record mistakes.
descriptions.2: Transfer the knowledge into projects, cases, or real tasks.
descriptions.3: Lock the learning in with a share-out, artifact, or reflective summary.
